name: vik
role: av-playback

Filing an autoplay control bug on my iMac M1: since 147.0.3, Firefox takes over
and plays YouTube videos through the browser instead of leaving them to my
system audio setup — 147.0.2 didn't do this. I just start a video on YouTube and
Firefox grabs playback and sound when it shouldn't.

Feels like a regression in how we hand off media control.
